About Us · Est. 1982

We've Been at This a Long Time.
There's a Reason for That.

Our Story

It Started with a Handshake.

Back in 1982, Bob Brandano and Doug Nucatola started Great Eastern Seafood with a simple idea: treat people right, source the best fish you can find, and the rest will take care of itself. More than 40 years later, that idea is still the whole playbook.

What started on the Historic Boston Fish Pier has grown into a state-of-the-art facility at the Black Falcon Pier in the heart of Boston's Seaport District. We now distribute fresh, frozen, and previously frozen seafood across the U.S. and beyond, sourcing from Canada, Europe, South America, Asia, and right here in New England. None of that growth has changed the fundamentals. The same honesty, the same relationships, the same obsession with quality that got us here is what keeps our customers coming back.

1982Est. Boston, MA
Who We Are

The Principles We Live By

Vision

We're in this for the long haul, not just as a business, but as stewards of the resource. We'll keep evolving our practices, deepening our relationships, and holding ourselves to the standards our customers expect and our ecosystems deserve.

Mission

To source the best seafood in the world, handle it with care, and get it to our customers in a way that makes them proud to serve it. That's it. That's the whole mission.

Promise

We've been saying these four words since 1982. We mean them just as much today. Every order, every customer, every vendor, every team member.

Honesty

Service
We've been saying these four words since 1982. We mean them just as much today.
Our Facility

If You Saw Our Facility, You'd Understand.

Our facility at the Black Falcon Pier in Boston's Seaport District isn't the biggest you'll ever see, but as more than one Massachusetts state health inspector has noted, it's steps above the rest. Every detail, from our fully refrigerated processing areas and loading dock to our ozonated water system and real-time temperature tracking, exists for one reason: to make sure what leaves here is as good as it possibly can be. We're just minutes from Logan International Airport, which means when speed matters, we deliver.

Approved HACCP Plan
SQF Certified
Ucrete Floor & Wall System
Real-Time Temperature Tracking
Refrigerated Processing Area
Refrigerated Loading Dock
Allergen Control Areas
Ozonated Water Throughout
Calibrated Foot Sprayers
Slurry Ice System
State-of-the-Art Thawing System
X-Ray / Waterjet Cutting Machine

We may not be the biggest facility they have seen, but it is definitely steps above the rest.

Massachusetts State Health Inspector

Our Team

We'd Like You to Meet the Team.

Some of our team has been here for over 20 years. A few have been here from the very start. That's not a coincidence, it's the culture. When you work somewhere that treats you like family, you tend to stick around. And when your team sticks around, your customers notice.
